name: AI agent chat
description: An AI-powered chat agent that can search the web to answer user questions. Takes a question, searches the web via Exa for relevant sources, uses Claude to synthesize a comprehensive answer, and delivers the result to Slack with rich Block Kit formatting.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

question.description: The user's question to research and answer

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Search the web for relevant sources via Exa
Compile search results into source text
